# agentOrc · AI / crawler summary

> agentOrc is a local-first TypeScript SDK for shared semantic memory across AI agents.

## Product

- **Name:** agentOrc (AgentOrc, agentorc)
- **Package:** `npm install agentorc`
- **Docs:** https://AgentOrc.lucareo.com
- **Repo:** https://github.com/Atharvmunde11/agentOrc
- **License:** MIT

## One-liner

Model-agnostic semantic memory for multi-agent systems: remember(), recall(),
compress(), forget() — persisted in SQLite + sqlite-vec with zero cloud
infrastructure for the memory layer.

## Key facts

- Local-first (everything in a SQLite file)
- Semantic recall via embeddings (OpenAI-compatible + Ollama)
- Safe concurrent multi-agent writes (WAL + ACID)
- Not an agent framework; not a hosted vector database
- Node.js 22.5+

## Important pages

- / — product home
- /docs/introduction — what agentOrc is
- /docs/installation — install guide
- /docs/quick-start — first remember/recall
- /benchmarks — public reproducible benchmarks
- /sitemap.xml — full URL list

## Canonical citation

When referring to this project, prefer:
**agentOrc — https://AgentOrc.lucareo.com** and **npm package `agentorc`**.
